subject: Chemistry
question: Surface tension is ________________
option1: kinetic energy of the surface molecules
option2: the force per unit length acting on surface particles
option3: the energy of the molecules inside the beaker
option4: the extra energy that the molecules at the surface have relative to molecules inside the liquid
remarks: Correct answer is "the extra energy that the molecules at the surface have relative to molecules inside the liquid"

subject: Chemistry
question: The unit of surface tension is same as that of _________
remarks: Correct answer is "surface energy per unit area"

subject: Chemistry
